title: aalius retroversa
side_effects: Aalius retroversa can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, nausea, and vomiting in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds has been linked to liver and kidney damage, as well as respiratory problems. In rare cases, misuse of the plant can also cause hallucinations, tremors, and changes in heart rate, requiring immediate medical attention. Overuse of Aalius retroversa can also lead to dependency and withdrawal symptoms upon cessation of use.
